framework: A path qualifies only when >=3 prominent, proven people in the field visibly share the capability, each with a resolving link — the pattern across standouts is the evidence, not market demand. Ranked by strength of that pattern. Curated editorial, not DOL-derived.

paths.what_it_is: Systematically disassembling and benchmarking a product to expose its cost, manufacturing, and design tradeoffs, then publishing the findings.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves a candidate can read a physical product back into the design and manufacturing decisions behind it, a rigor that has repeatedly reshaped how major automakers engineer their vehicles.

paths.what_it_is: Owning a project end-to-end, designing it in CAD, fabricating and testing it, and publicly documenting the full iteration loop.
paths.why_it_signals: It puts the entire mechanical engineering pipeline on display, giving an employer direct, verifiable evidence of design judgment and hands-on execution instead of a resume claim.

paths.what_it_is: Deep fluency in geometric dimensioning and tolerancing and tolerance-stack analysis, demonstrated through authored training material or standards-committee work.
paths.why_it_signals: It shows a candidate can make assemblies fit and function correctly at scale, the exact skill that prevents costly manufacturing and quality failures.
